summary: Comprehensive testing of new Gallery CRM features: Calendar page (appointments CRUD), SMS/WhatsApp/Call buttons on customer cards, dashboard sales trend chart, top brands ranking, and service worker. All features working correctly.

issues: Recharts ResponsiveContainer shows width/height -1 warning on initial load (known issue from previous iteration, not blocking)

passed_tests: Login with demo@aslanbasoto.com / demo123 works
Dashboard: Sales trend area chart visible (data-testid='sales-trend-chart') - shows 'Son 30 Gün Satış Trendi'
Dashboard: Top brands ranking visible (data-testid='top-brands') - shows 'Marka Sıralaması' with Mercedes, BMW, Audi
Dashboard: Monthly income/expense bar chart still working (data-testid='monthly-chart')
Dashboard: Vehicle distribution donut chart still working (data-testid='status-chart')
Calendar page: Navigate via sidebar 'Randevular' link - works
Calendar page: Monthly calendar grid shows current month (Şubat 2026)
Calendar page: Today (25) highlighted in gold
Calendar page: Days with appointments show colored dots
Calendar page: 'Randevu Ekle' button opens appointment form modal
Calendar page: Form has all required fields - Başlık*, Tarih*, Saat, Müşteri Adı, Telefon, Araç (dropdown), Notlar
Calendar page: POST /api/appointments creates appointment successfully
Calendar page: New appointment appears in 'Yaklaşan Randevular' sidebar
Calendar page: New appointment appears as dot on calendar day
Calendar page: Status change Bekliyor → Onaylandı (green) works via checkmark button
Calendar page: Status change Onaylandı → Tamamlandı (blue) works via checkmark button
Calendar page: DELETE /api/appointments/{id} removes appointment
Calendar page: Appointment details show in 'Bugünkü Randevular' section when day selected
Calendar page: Month navigation (<, >) buttons work
Customers page: WhatsApp button (green) present on customer cards with phone
Customers page: SMS button (blue) present on customer cards with phone
Customers page: Ara/Call button (gray) present on customer cards with phone
Customers page: WhatsApp href uses wa.me/90XXXXXXXXXX format
Customers page: SMS href uses sms:XXXXXXXXXXX protocol
Customers page: Call href uses tel:XXXXXXXXXXX protocol
Service Worker: /sw.js accessible at public URL
Backend API: GET /api/appointments returns list
Backend API: POST /api/appointments creates appointment
Backend API: PUT /api/appointments/{id} updates status
Backend API: DELETE /api/appointments/{id} deletes appointment
Backend API: Endpoints require authentication (401 without token)
critical_code_review_comments: Recharts console warnings about width/height -1 continue to appear on dashboard load - minor UX issue, charts render correctly after data loads
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_Playwright Test Randevu appointment during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: 1) Calendar page at /calendar with full appointment CRUD - form modal works, status cycle (Bekliyor→Onaylandı→Tamamlandı) works, colored dots on calendar days indicate appointments. 2) Dashboard now has Sales Trend area chart (last 30 days) and Top Brands ranking bar chart in addition to existing monthly bar chart and donut chart. 3) Customer cards have 3 action buttons when phone exists: WhatsApp (green, opens wa.me), SMS (blue, sms: protocol), Ara (gray, tel: protocol). 4) Service worker at /sw.js handles offline caching. Existing appointment 'Test Sürüşü' (2026-02-26, 14:00, Ahmet Yılmaz, status Bekliyor) preserved.

calendar_page.appointment_dots: Colored dots on days with appointments (gold=Bekliyor, green=Onaylandı, blue=Tamamlandı)
calendar_page.add_appointment_button: Opens modal form with all fields
calendar_page.status_actions: Checkmark buttons for Onayla and Tamamla transitions

dashboard_charts.sales_trend: Area chart showing last 30 days sales (data-testid='sales-trend-chart')
